# Summary

- Feature(s) affected:
- Type of change:
  - [ ] New Feature
  - [ ] Behavior Change
  - [ ] Bug Fix
  - [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
  - [ ] Architectural Change

---

# Specification Impact

- [ ] No spec change required
- [ ] Updated existing spec: specs/Fxx/spec.md
- [ ] Updated implementation plan: specs/Fxx/plan.md
- [ ] New ADR required (ADR Gap declared)
- [ ] Existing ADR updated

If no spec update was required, explain why:

---

# Contract Impact

- [ ] No API change
- [ ] API contract updated (OpenAPI updated)
- [ ] Event contract updated (CloudEvents version reviewed)
- [ ] Contract tests updated

If contract changed, specify version impact:
- [ ] Patch
- [ ] Minor
- [ ] Major

---

# Persistence Impact

- [ ] No schema change
- [ ] Schema changed (migration included)
- [ ] Outbox logic affected
- [ ] Transaction boundary affected

---

# Global Documentation Impact

- [ ] No impact on docs/spec/*
- [ ] Updated constitution.md
- [ ] Updated context.md
- [ ] Updated roadmap.md
- [ ] Updated features/*.md

If not updated, confirm the change does not alter global intent.

---

# ADR Compliance

List ADRs materially impacted:

- ADR-000X:
- ADR-000Y:

Confirm compliance:
- [ ] Architecture boundaries respected
- [ ] No cross-root imports
- [ ] No business logic in adapters
- [ ] Decimal used for money and percentages
- [ ] UTC enforced for timestamps
- [ ] JWT discipline respected

---

# Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Contract tests updated
- [ ] Migration upgrade test verified
- [ ] Event delivery behavior tested (if applicable)

---

# Notes

Explain any non-trivial decisions or trade-offs.
